content.question: What is the relative causal weight of comprehensive structure (no age-based selection) versus other simultaneous reforms (teacher master's-degree requirement, curriculum coherence, welfare-state income equalization, housing policy) in explaining Finland's equity gains from the 1970s to 1990s?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a qualitative comparative analysis (QCA) or synthetic case-study analysis of other nations that implemented comprehensive schooling at similar times (Sweden, DDR, Scotland) with varying combinations of teacher professionalization and welfare-state policies; estimate heterogeneous treatment effects using mediation analysis of administrative outcome data if available
